auth_notes: Requires a Google Cloud Console project with Gmail API enabled. Users must configure an OAuth consent screen and create credentials to obtain a Client ID and Client Secret. For production use with non-workspace accounts, Google verification may be required.
rate_limits: 1,000,000,000 quota units per day per project; 250 quota units per user per second. Sending an email costs 100 units.
gotchas: Strict attachment size limit of 25MB for outgoing messages via API.
Google Cloud projects in 'Testing' mode expire refresh tokens every 7 days, requiring manual re-auth.
Daily sending limits are lower for trial accounts or new G-Suite domains to prevent spam.
client_must_provide: Gmail account with API access enabled
List of required scopes (e.g., gmail.send, gmail.readonly)
research_notes: While Gmail is the primary node for general email, for high-volume 'Email Marketing', SendGrid is recommended to avoid Gmail's anti-spam blocks. Webhook support for Gmail in n8n requires setting up Google Cloud Pub/Sub.

effort_recommendation.rationale: While Gmail is the primary node for general email, for high-volume 'Email Marketing', SendGrid is recommended to avoid Gmail's anti-spam blocks. Webhook support for Gmail in n8n requires setting up Google Cloud Pub/Sub.
